patch.value: No direct command to inspect the local queue, trigger a flush, or see per-command frequency from local JSONL; today only pm health surfaces telemetry state.

pm telemetry status (queue depth/last flush/endpoint), flush (inline flushTelemetryQueueNow), stats [--limit N] (group local events by command, offline), clear (disable+delete queue); advisory; pm_run action=telemetry; empty-queue exits 0.
No direct command to inspect the local queue, trigger a flush, or see per-command frequency from local JSONL; today only pm health surfaces telemetry state.

value.author: codex-telemetry-batch
value.text: Implemented pm telemetry local analytics command surface: pm telemetry status/flush/stats/clear wired in CLI registration, command help content, SDK contracts, MCP pm_run action=telemetry dispatch, and refreshed contracts snapshot. New command behavior: status reports queue depth + endpoint + last flush metadata; stats groups queued events by command with --limit; flush triggers inline queue flush and reports before/after depth; clear disables telemetry and removes runtime queue/state artifacts. Added dedicated unit coverage at tests/unit/commands/telemetry-command.spec.ts plus release-readiness + MCP contract parity tests. Manual temp-dir smoke (dist CLI) executed status/stats/flush/clear/status in a fresh PM_PATH+PM_GLOBAL_PATH sandbox and confirmed clear leaves telemetry disabled with queue_entries=0 and no runtime telemetry artifacts.

patch.value: Completed pm telemetry local analytics command surface (status/flush/stats/clear), MCP/contracts alignment, contract snapshot refresh, manual temp-dir smoke validation, and passing full quality/security gates.

value.author: codex-telemetry-batch
value.text: Post-PR CI static gate reported changelog drift after closing pm-t4wb/pm-6xdl. Resolved by regenerating CHANGELOG.md via pnpm changelog:pm and verifying pnpm changelog:pm:check passes; static gate parity command (version/check/contracts/security/quality/npm pack dry-run) now passes locally.
